meta.commitMessage:
feat: update guide with offline mode, skill map, weekly plan, voice review sections

Added new offline_mode section and updated dictionary, flashcards, assistant,
today, and start_overview sections to cover all current features. Removed
outdated content. Both Russian and German versions updated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
